title: SourceNote — Unified Signal Input Format
description: Schema for SourceNote, the unified input format for all external signal connectors in AI Company OS

source_note_id.description: Unique ID per connector run. Format: SN-{connector_id}-{YYYYMMDD}-{NNN}

connector_id.description: Which connector produced this. e.g. search_query, github

source_platform.description: Where the content originated. e.g. reddit, github, g2, product_hunt, rss, web

source_category.description: Signal category matching the scout engine's 6 signal sources

query_or_feed.description: The query or feed URL that produced this SourceNote

url.description: Source URL. Must be a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of original publication (if available)

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the connector fetched the data

excerpt.description: Short excerpt. Never full content. Max 500 chars.

product_line_refs.description: Suggested product lines (scout engine may override)

raw_signal_type.description: Connector's best guess at signal type. Scout engine will reclassify
